chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application Nos. 539, 540 & 541 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case. 1. For orders on office objection No. 25. 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 11.02.2025. None present ************ None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. On 03.11.2020, some directions were given to the Applicant’s Counsel, which are yet to be complied with. Accordingly, these Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Reference Applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
